summary: Issue #407 Phase 2.6 Demo exit gate: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Playwright suite (50 tests) covers Decisions journey, Manual Refresh, responsive IA, accessibility, Vietnamese locale, and assistance regression; demo-e2e CI job + 10 contract pytest cases; minimal app fixes for ?load=error, in-progress useParams, unavailable chart sr-only. ADR-026 — Analytics #404 and Settings #405 non-blocking. No CRITICAL reliability/security findings.

interfaceChanges.description: DecisionsPageClient passes initialLoadState from ?load=error for truthful error-state E2E.
Unavailable KPI cards expose sr-only chart equivalent text for a11y exit gate.

mappings.criterion: E2E covers Home → Decisions, Priority Workflow 1, all remaining visible cards, and approval → In Progress for all nine workflows
Manual Refresh is tested from mutated Home/Decisions state and returns to default Decisions Recommendations state
Playwright desktop (≥56rem/896px) and mobile-web (<42rem/672px) viewport suites preserve IA, terminology, and approval behavior for the Decisions journey
Automated accessibility covers keyboard flow, focus-visible, 44×44 targets, dialog/popover focus, chart equivalents, and reduced motion
Vietnamese copy/diacritics and truthful empty/loading/error/unavailable states are checked
Production build and deploy-contract tests run in CI
Public smoke command verifies DNS, valid TLS, 2xx response, and the Decisions route without requiring backend health
Exit gate does not depend on optional Settings issue #405

Exit gate does not depend on optional Analytics issue #404 — if #404 ships, its E2E coverage (including Decisions ↔ Analytics deep links) is exercised as a conditional addition to this suite, not a blocking requirement

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review passed; Guardrails found no blocking reliability, security, observability, performance, or acceptance-coverage gaps. 9/9 ACs mapped; 50 Playwright + 10 contract tests green.
